name: Trendline Adult Cat Food – Salmon 10KG
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural cat food with salmon protein, brewer’s yeast for immune support, Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed and taurine. Carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats.
description: Trendline Adult Cat Food -Salmon , expertly formulated by leading pet nutritionists, this all-natural recipe delivers the power of high-quality fish protein to keep muscles strong and energy levels high. Enriched with brewer’s yeast for immune support, Omega-3 & -6 from flaxseed for soft, shiny fur, and taurine for heart and eye health—it’s the perfect balance for your cat’s wellness. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein …………………………….. 27% Fat …………………………………….10% Crude Ash ……………………………8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ………….3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewers Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 – B2 – B3 (niacin) – B6 – B12 – B7 (biotin) – B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. Why Choose Trendline Salmon? 27% Protein from Fish – builds lean muscle and supports active lifestyles. 10% Healthy Fats – nourish your cat’s skin and coat for a silky shine. Brewer’s Yeast – supports natural immunity and digestive health. Omega-3 & -6 Fatty Acids – reduce shedding and enhance skin condition. Taurine Enriched – essential for heart function and sharp vision.
